page.title: OAuth Applications
page.subtitle: Manage developer app credentials, scopes, and redirect URIs.
page.emptyDescription: Adjust your filters or create the first developer application.

sheet.createDescription: Fill in the details to generate a client_id and client_secret.
sheet.editDescription: Update scopes, redirect URIs, and other settings.

form.redirectUrisPlaceholder:
One URI per line, e.g.:
https://example.com/callback
form.redirectUrisDescription: One allowed callback URL per line.
form.scopesDescription: Select the scopes this application can request.

secretDialog.title: Client Secret
secretDialog.description: This client secret is shown only once. Copy and store it securely before closing this dialog.
secretDialog.rotateDescription: The old secret has been invalidated. This new secret is shown only once — copy it now.

actions.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. Delete application "{{name}}"?
